overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a player character exploring a futuristic urban plaza at dusk. The character ascends and descends exterior stairs of a modern building with curved architecture, investigates a cordoned-off crime scene with police tape, and experiences a sudden weather change to a thick orange fog or sandstorm.

agents.ego_description: walking steadily through open plaza toward modern building complex with curved architecture

notable_agents.action: walking in same direction toward the building entrance

entered.detail: tall palm trees lining the left side of the plaza
large building facade covered in glowing digital advertisements and screens
modern building with distinctive curved roof structure and glass panels
wide concrete paving stones covering the open plaza area

segments.scene_description: The segment opens on a wide futuristic urban plaza at dusk, with tall palm trees on the left and a massive curved glass building ahead. Digital billboards glow in the distance as the character walks forward across the concrete pavement, passing scattered pedestrians.

scene_state.functional_zone: exterior staircase of modern building with overhead cover

events.description: begins ascending wide exterior staircase along building facade

agents.ego_description: climbing the exterior stairs on the right side of the building, moving toward upper terrace

entered.detail: wide concrete stairs with metal railings ascending along building
tall glass panels with reflections of the evening sky
massive structural columns supporting the building overhang

segments.scene_description: The character begins ascending a wide exterior staircase along the building's right flank, moving from the open plaza into a semi-covered area beneath the curved overhang. The glass facade reflects the dusk sky as the climb continues toward the upper terrace level.

scene_state.functional_zone: upper terrace seating area under curved roof structure

events.description: begins descending stairs on opposite side of upper terrace

agents.ego_description: walking across upper terrace past purple outdoor seating, then descending toward lower level

entered.detail: open paved area on upper level with patterned tile flooring
dramatic curved architectural roof with ribbed metal beams and integrated lighting
futuristic purple chairs and tables arranged in seating clusters
transparent safety railing overlooking the lower plaza level

segments.scene_description: Reaching the top of the stairs, the character enters an upper terrace beneath a dramatic curved roof structure with integrated neon lighting. The area features purple futuristic outdoor seating and glass railings overlooking the lower level. The character walks across this space and begins descending stairs on the far side.

scene_state.functional_zone: cordoned-off crime scene with police tape and evidence markers

events.description: enters restricted area cordoned off with yellow police line tape
discovers multiple bodies lying on ground within police cordon

agents.ego_description: carefully walking through crime scene examining bodies and police tape barriers

entered.detail: yellow and black striped barrier tape with POLICE LINE text illuminated by posts
multiple deceased individuals lying on pavement within cordoned area
red and white medical or emergency crates near the bodies
illuminated yellow posts marking the perimeter of the crime scene

segments.scene_description: Descending to street level, the character enters a restricted crime scene area cordoned off with glowing yellow police tape. Several bodies lie on the asphalt within the perimeter, surrounded by emergency crates and illuminated barricade posts. The area is devoid of other pedestrians as the character examines the scene.

scene_state.functional_zone: foggy street level with sandstorm conditions and reduced visibility

events.description: weather suddenly shifts to heavy fog or sandstorm with thick orange-brown atmosphere

agents.ego_description: moving forward through dense fog with limited visibility, navigating by building lights

notable_agents.action: walking through fog in the distance, partially obscured by haze

entered.detail: thick orange-tinted fog or sandstorm reducing visibility throughout scene

segments.scene_description: As the character leaves the crime scene, the weather abruptly changes to a thick orange fog or sandstorm that engulfs the environment. Visibility drops dramatically, with palm trees becoming dark silhouettes against the glowing fog. The character continues walking through the hazy street as distant pedestrians appear as shadows in the mist.

scene_state.functional_zone: exterior staircase ascending through fog back to upper terrace

events.description: begins ascending stairs to return to upper level through foggy conditions

agents.ego_description: climbing stairs back to upper terrace while navigating through thick fog

notable_agents.action: descending stairs while character ascends, passing in the fog

entered.detail: concrete stairs ascending through fog with metal railings barely visible

segments.scene_description: The character begins ascending the exterior stairs again, moving upward through the dense fog. The curved roof structure looms overhead as the climb continues, with other pedestrians occasionally appearing through the haze descending the stairs. The segment ends as the character returns to the upper terrace level, still enveloped in the orange-tinted fog.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a wide, open urban plaza at dusk into the elevated, neon-lit architecture of a futuristic building. It begins by walking across a concrete pavement lined with tall palm trees and glowing digital billboards, moving steadily toward a massive curved glass structure. As the character reaches the building, the perspective shifts upward, ascending a wide exterior staircase that leads from the open air into a semi-covered area beneath a sweeping overhang. The scene then opens onto an upper terrace featuring purple outdoor seating and glass railings under a dramatic curved roof with integrated neon lighting, before finally turning downward as the camera begins to descend the stairs on the far side.

The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a stark, cordoned-off crime scene into a disorienting, orange-tinted atmospheric haze. It begins with a descent to street level, where the camera moves past glowing yellow police tape to examine bodies and emergency crates scattered across the asphalt. As the character leaves the restricted area, the clear air abruptly shifts into a thick orange fog or sandstorm that engulfs the environment, reducing palm trees and distant pedestrians to dark silhouettes. The scene then transitions as the camera begins ascending exterior stairs, climbing through the dense mist beneath a looming curved roof structure. Finally, the movement concludes upon returning to the upper terrace level, still completely enveloped in the glowing orange haze.
